calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-21-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Appearances:
Shannon Ball Jones, Esq. For Plaintiff 444 De Haro, LP, The Property Manager, David Murphy also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: 444 De Haro, LP and against the defendant: Basic Brown Bears, Inc.
Principal of $75,494.40
Attorney's fees of $4,648.00
Costs of $516.50
Interest of $4,246.56
Daily damages of $76,460.28 (per diem $490.13 from 14/Dec/04 through 20/May/04)
For the total of $161,365.74
Plaintiff attorney to submit judgment for signature.
Judgment signed and filed May 21, 2004
